scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/tests/listing.test.ts src/tests/create-payment-batch.test.ts src/tests/access.integration.test.ts src/tests/auth-me.integration.test.ts src/tests/geocode-route-source-batch.integration.test.ts src/tests/import-route-gpx.integration.test.ts src/tests/inspector-profile.integration.test.ts src/tests/order-workflow.integration.test.ts src/tests/pool-import.integration.test.ts src/tests/route-generation.integration.test.ts src/tests/parse-pool-xlsx.test.ts
scripts.auth:generate: pnpm dlx auth@1.5.5 generate --yes --config src/better-auth.config.ts --adapter drizzle --dialect postgresql --output src/better-auth.schema.ts
